title: Seedance 3.0 — NEW AI Video Generator Makes 1H+ Movies
summary: Seedance 3.0 is a leaked version of an AI video generator claimed to produce 18-minute movies from single prompts with an 8x cost reduction. Seedance 2.0 currently ranks first for audio-paired video generation on Artificial Analysis leaderboards.
writeup: The video examines Seedance 3.0, an AI video generator rumored to produce feature-length output (18+ minutes) from single prompts, and it fact-checks the circulating claims against Seedance 2.0's current benchmark performance. The rumored features include a Narrative Memory Chain, an MMDiT v2 upgrade, an 8x cost reduction, and native 4K output. The framing matters because it separates marketing claims from what the prior version actually delivers on benchmarks.
